summary: Comprehensive testing of POD Guest Tracking System (Stateless Design Upload Flow). All backend APIs and frontend flows working correctly. 11/11 backend tests passed. Frontend localStorage behavior verified - temp_design_id stored on upload and cleared after linking.

issues: Cart page shows 'Custom T-Shirt (Standard)' text instead of actual product image thumbnail - minor cosmetic issue

seed_data_creation: Test designs created during testing with TEST_ prefix for identification
context_for_next_testing_agent: POD Guest Tracking System fully tested. Key endpoints: /api/pod/upload-design (returns temp_design_id, status=unassigned), /api/pod/link-design (links design to contact, status=assigned), /api/admin/pod/guest-designs (supports status filter: assigned/unassigned). Frontend stores temp_design_id in localStorage after upload and clears it after successful linking.

pod_upload_design_endpoint.details: Returns temp_design_id and saves with status='unassigned'. No session/cookie required.

pod_link_design_endpoint.details: Links design to contact using temp_design_id, updates status to 'assigned'. Creates contact record if not exists.

frontend_localstorage_behavior.details: temp_design_id stored in localStorage after upload, cleared after successful linking to contact.

admin_guest_designs_page.details: Shows All/Assigned/Unassigned filter tabs with correct counts. Table displays client info, product, status, original/mockup images.

admin_status_filter_api.details: API returns correct counts for assigned_count and unassigned_count. Filter by status works correctly.

full_flow_upload_to_cart.details: Complete flow tested: upload design -> fill contact info -> add to cart. Design linked to contact, status changed to assigned.
